message:
test(db): add 19 pool.rs unit tests for integrity, refs, caching, corruption

Cover previously-untested public functions:
- run_startup_integrity_check: healthy DB, memory DB, missing file
- run_full_integrity_check: healthy DB, memory DB
- sample_recent_message_refs: memory, missing, seeded data, limit
- get_or_create_pool/create_pool: caching identity, alias
- sample_pool_stats_now: metrics integration
- sqlite_file_is_healthy: corrupt, nonexistent, valid
- is_corruption_error_message: pattern matching
- quarantine_sidecar: rename and no-op cases

Pool test count: 21 → 40. DB lib total: 552 → 571.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
